name: labdoor-customs
description: Lab Door Customs monorepo — React storefront + Express API (single-server deploy)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.validate-env: npm run validate-env -w backend && npm run validate-env -w frontend
